# Clockout — Local Automation for Owner-Operators
> Flat-fee automation installs for service businesses in Roscoe, Rockford, Beloit, and the Northern Illinois corridor. One leak, one fix, installed in 3–7 days. No retainer. No lock-in. You own the system.

## About
https://clockout.io/about — Why Clockout exists. Anti-agency, local-only, flat-fee model. Written by founder Donovin from Roscoe, IL.

## Services
https://clockout.io — Homepage with full service catalog, pricing ($300–$3,000), cost calculator, and FAQ.

## Solutions
https://clockout.io/solutions — Twelve named automation solutions (Ghost Closer, Cold Bid Resurrector, No-Show Punisher, 5-Star Machine, 10PM Desk Killer, etc.).

## Product
https://clockout.io/operator-os — Message-based executive assistant running on iMessage. Voice memo or text input, no app, no new number.

## Assessment
https://clockout.io/assessment — Free 5-question Operations Leak Scorecard. Estimates monthly revenue leakage in dollars. No-commitment.

## Blog
https://clockout.io/blog — Field notes covering HVAC, plumbing, salons, real estate, auto repair, contractors, landscaping, barbershops.

## Pricing
- Single System Fix: $300–$800 one-time (one workflow, 3–7 day install)
- Operations Stack: $1,200–$3,000 one-time (3–5 workflows)
- Monthly Monitoring (optional): $20–$75/month

## Key Statistics
- 68% of missed callers never call back
- $800–$1,200 cost per missed call
- 8–12 hours/week the average owner spends chasing invoices
- Estimate follow-up automation closes 18–30% of cold bids
- 3–7 days: typical install time
- 30-day guarantee: if system doesn't recover 10 hours/week, Clockout works free until it does

## Service Area
Roscoe, IL · Rockford, IL · Beloit, WI · Loves Park, IL · Machesney Park, IL · South Beloit, IL · Winnebago County · Boone County, IL · Rock County, WI · I-39 corridor

## Contact
Email: hello@clockout.work
